_comment: Tian Shui City (天水城) — major mortal+cultivator trading city (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L35). Estimated 100,000-300,000 residents (CANON_RI_ECOLOGY.md 1.5). Wang Lin's first destination after 4-year closed-door cultivation. Heng Yue Sect has interests here. Stand-in: large plains village. Final: walled city with cultivator market district, Heng Yue Sect trade hall, mortal residential districts.
